title: Gone Phishing
relevance_summary: Phishing attack exploiting increaseAllowance() function to steal tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls increaseAllowance() with large amounts
prevention.trigger: increaseAllowance() called with amount > threshold in single tx

monitoring_rules: Block txs with suspicious increaseAllowance() calls
summary: A user lost 24M USD due to a phishing attack exploiting the increaseAllowance() function. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring for large allowance increases.
